name: Good Luck Rice Custard
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the raw rice in 4 cups of water until almost tender.
2. Add sugar and cook until desired tenderness is reached.
3. Stir in evaporated milk and raisins.
4. Mix a portion of the pudding with milk in a separate bowl.
5. Combine the pudding mixture with the rice.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff.
7. Beat yolks separately.
8. Mix the beaten egg whites and yolks together.
9. Turn off the heat.
10. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
11. If the mixture is too thick, add more milk as needed.
